question_prompt: Q2: What AI-related skills or experience are you most looking for in candidates in 2025?
panels: Q2: AI model development and programming (e.g., Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch)

Q2: Proficiency in AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, MidJourney, or AI automation software)
